# bynunc.

> bynunc is a premier visual production studio specializing in filming and editing across Saudi Arabia, the UAE, Oman, Egypt, and the United States.

bynunc provides end-to-end visual production services — from concept to final delivery — for exhibitions, real estate, advertising campaigns, and festivals. Founded with 9+ years of industry experience, bynunc operates across five countries and serves clients ranging from global exhibitions to regional brands and government entities.

## Services

- Content Creation: scripting, filming, and editing for all platforms
- Documentaries: long-form cinematic storytelling
- Series, Short Films & BTS: narrative production from behind-the-scenes to final cut
- Videography & Photography: visual documentation for events, products, and people
- Commercial Ads: high-impact video production for advertising campaigns
- Post Production: editing, color grading, and motion graphics
- Event Coverage & Conferences: full-scale media production for exhibitions, trade show booths, and conferences
- Social Media Management: ongoing content and account management (via partner network)
- Motion Graphics: animated content for brand and campaigns (via partner network)
- Booth Building: exhibition booth design and build (via partner network)
- Graphic Design: brand and campaign design (via partner network)

## Service Areas

Saudi Arabia, United Arab Emirates, Oman, Egypt, United States

## Clients

Misk Schools, Mashariq, Riyadh Season, Misk Global Forum, LEAP, World Defense Show, NHC, Takamol, Saudi Cup
